artifacts_excluded_reason: Generated output artifacts are excluded from the public seed dataset by default.
logs_excluded_reason: Raw runner logs are excluded from the public seed dataset.

# Agent Apprenticeship Workflow Task

Attempt: baseline

You are the worker/reviser agent for an agent apprenticeship data-generation run.
Produce high-quality work artifacts for the task and preserve useful execution evidence while you work.
Write agent_trace.json as a structured workflow trace following the AgentTrace schema.
Each step should represent one meaningful action: reading context, using a tool, creating or editing an artifact, validating output, handling an error, or delivering the

where applicable.
Do not grade your own work in the trace. Model-based grader, verifier, and evaluator roles will assess the attempt later.

step, turn, actor, action, operation, tool, obs
